title: NGS dataset for the study "Persistence of hepatitis C virus in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of patients who achieved sustained virological response following treatment with direct-acting antivirals is associated with a distinct pre-existing immune exhaustion status"
author: Caraballo Cortés, Kamila
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: MiSeq Illumina raw trimmed fastq  two-directional reads of 5'UTR hepatitis C virus region from pre-treatment peripheral blood and plasma sample of patients in whom the virus was detected  in PBMC by ultrasensitive PCR post-successful DAA-based antiviral treatment.
steps_raw: MiSeq Illumina raw trimmed fastq  two-directional reads of 5'UTR hepatitis C virus region from pre-treatment peripheral blood and plasma sample of patients in whom the virus was detected  in PBMC by ultrasensitive PCR post-successful DAA-based antiviral treatment.
